title: List
description: A vertical list of items, optionally selectable and with leading/trailing icons.
whenToUse: For secondary navigation, menu items, or selectable lists. When items have labels plus optional icons.
whenNotToUse: For tabular data — use Data Table. For primary navigation — use Nav Vertical.

keyboard.action: Activate or select the focused item

_legacyAccessibilityNotes: Use role="list" and role="listitem" appropriately. aria-selected indicates selection.
